name: nube-system
description: A modern, utility-first CSS framework with semantic theme tokens and fluid responsive design

scripts.build: sass src/variables.scss:styles/variables.css src/flex.scss:styles/flex.css src/layout.scss:styles/layout.css src/spacing.scss:styles/spacing.css src/typography.scss:styles/typography.css --style=compressed --no-source-map

author: Don Vaskez
